title: 日本ダービーの後に・恐るべき一等星

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby reaches its conclusion with
Admire Vega far in the lead. Meisho Doto was no
match for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Completely exhausted, she's not even able to
bask in the joy of running such a renowned race.
She leaves hoping she can one day learn to smile
and enjoy these experiences.
